prompt: Tap cutoff seat before ladder-pressure action.
why_v1: Seat anchor keeps action order stable before tournament-pressure decisions.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The cutoff is the right seat anchor, so the tournament read stays tied to the last pressure seat before the button takes over.
